recalls.Description: The Museum of Modern Art has announced a recall of its glass snow globes featuring the 'Little Wanderer' figurine. These snow globes stand 4.5 inches tall and 3.3 inches wide, resting on a wooden base, and contain a plastic figurine available in yellow, blue, or red. The product poses a risk as the glass may crack or break, leading to potential lacerations.
recalls.Title: MoMA Recalls Little Wanderer Glass Snow Globes Due to Laceration Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact MoMA Design Store at 800-793-3167 from 9:30 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday. You can also email order_services@moma.org with the subject line 'RECALL' or visit https://storehelpcenter.moma.org/hc/en-us/articles/22508238195853-Recall for more details.

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 39 reports of the snow globe cracking or fracturing. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: MoMA Design Stores and online at store.moma.org, available in November 2023 for approximately $85.

Importers.Name: Design Ideas Ltd, of Springfield, Illinois

Distributors.Name: The Museum of Modern Art, of New York

Remedies.Name: Stop using the snow globes immediately, discard them, and contact MoMA for a full refund.

recalls.metaDescription: MoMA recalls Little Wanderer glass snow globes due to laceration hazards. Contact MoMA for refunds and safety information.
